statement: In every magma, Equation 1419 (`x = y * (((z * w) * w) * u)`) implies Equation 523 (`x = y * (y * (z * (x * w)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0946
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z w) w) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op y (op z (op x w))))
